# Karan Mandalam

## Identity
- AI Product Builder & Systems Engineer
- Based in Bangalore, India
- BITS Pilani (B.E. Computer Science)
- Website: https://karan-profile-zeta.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/pingmepi
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/mandalam-karan

## Looking For
- AI Product Management roles (full-time)
- Contract/freelance: automation, full-stack product builds, AI system design

## What I Do
- Build multi-agent AI systems with eval-driven CI gating
- Ship full-stack products from zero to production (Next.js, Supabase, Razorpay)
- Design growth infrastructure: CRM automation, attribution, scheduling microservices
- 90+ n8n production workflows for sales, marketing, and operations automation

## Featured Projects

### Job Search Agent
Multi-agent system converting job postings into complete application packs via Telegram.
- 222 tests passing with CI gates enforced
- Planner/Executor/Profile agent architecture
- Eval framework: compile rate, forbidden claims, edit violations, cost, latency
- Tech: Python, FastAPI, OpenRouter, LaTeX, PostgreSQL, Telegram Bot API, Railway

### The Third Place
Live community and events platform with payments and admin panel.
- 118 commits (consumer), 36 commits (admin), 42 PRs
- Razorpay payments with idempotent sessions
- GA4/GTM analytics, Resend emails, short URLs
- RBAC admin panel with 5 roles
- Tech: Next.js (SSR), TypeScript, Supabase, Razorpay, Resend, Vercel
- Live: https://mythirdplace.rapchai.com

### MereKapade
AI-powered custom apparel design platform.
- Prompt-to-design commerce with fabric.js canvas
- OpenAI DALL-E/GPT-4o integration
- Tech: React, fabric.js, Supabase, OpenAI API
- Live: https://merekapade.com

## Skills
- Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Dart (Flutter)
- Frameworks: Next.js, React, FastAPI, Vite
- AI/ML: OpenRouter, OpenAI API, Multi-Agent Architecture, LLM Eval/CI Gating, Prompt Engineering
- Data/Infra: Supabase, PostgreSQL, Railway, Vercel, AWS EC2, Docker
- Payments: Razorpay (idempotent sessions, webhooks), Stripe (API analysis)
- Martech: n8n (90+ workflows), HubSpot, WebEngage, Netcore, CleverTap, GA4/GTM, WABA, Metabase
- Integrations: Telegram Bot API, VAPI Voice AI, Resend, Hootsuite, LaTeX

## Career Timeline
- Capgemini (2018-2020): Associate Consultant — CMS migration automation, Disney reservation system L3 support
- UpGrad (2020-2022): Product Strategist — 5+ reports, 4.5+/5 product ratings
- U&I Trust (2019-2022): Volunteer → Center Leader → Fundraising Coach — 40+ volunteers, 10% YoY growth
- AlmaBetter (2022-2024): Program Manager (COO's Office) — events charter, WebEngage, content ops
- Miles Education (2024-present): Product (Martech/CRM/Automation) — 90+ n8n workflows, 70% ops savings
- Independent (2025-present): AI Product Builder & Consulting
